about.title: About
about.intro: A developer who grows through self-driven projects and turns ideas into real products.
about.description: A web development-focused mindset; building on both frontend and backend, learning new technologies through hands-on experimentation, and prioritizing maintainable code.
about.full:
Aditya Mani Tripathi is a Full-Stack Developer and Computer Science undergraduate at ABES Engineering College, Ghaziabad, maintaining a CGPA of 8.15/10.

He is best known for leading his team to a national-level victory at the Smart India Hackathon 2025 Grand Finale — India's most prestigious hackathon organized by AICTE and the Ministry of Education. Competing against over 10,000 teams from across the country, his team secured 1st place with "Navjivan," a cross-platform AI-powered wellness application. Built using React Native, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB, the platform integrates intelligent recommendation engines that reduced habit relapse triggers by 40%, real-time background geofencing, SOS intervention alerts, and a robust backend with 10+ secured REST API endpoints using JWT authentication and bcrypt encryption. The application served over 200 beta users during its pilot phase.

His latest venture, Prepzo, is a production-grade SaaS platform for AI-driven interview preparation. Engineered with Next.js, TypeScript, React, PostgreSQL, and Supabase, it features secure Google OAuth authentication, Row-Level Security for granular multi-user data isolation, interactive analytics dashboards, personalized study roadmaps, PDF export capabilities, and real-time streaming — offering a comprehensive toolkit for job seekers to systematically prepare for technical interviews.

Beyond building products, Aditya is a consistent problem solver with a LeetCode rating of 1700+ earned by solving over 200 Data Structures and Algorithms problems. He also reached the Semi-Finalist stage at the RIFT 2026 National Hackathon.

His technical repertoire spans the modern web ecosystem: React.js, Next.js, and React Native on the frontend; Node.js and Express.js powering backend services; MongoDB, PostgreSQL, and Supabase for data persistence; and Git, GitHub, VS Code, and Vercel forming his deployment pipeline. He is proficient in C++, JavaScript, TypeScript, and SQL, with strong fundamentals in Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, DBMS, Operating Systems, and Computer Networks.

Driven by a philosophy of shipping real products over accumulating theoretical knowledge, Aditya approaches every engineering challenge with precision, scalability, and user-centric design at its core.

projects.title: PROJECTS
projects.intro: A collection of AI-driven platforms and full-stack applications.

items.title: Navjivan
items.description: A scalable cross-platform wellness application using React Native and Node.js with MongoDB backend, serving 200+ beta users. Features AI recommendation modules that reduced habit relapse triggers by 40%, background geofencing, SOS intervention notifications, and 10+ secured REST API endpoints with JWT authentication. Secured 1st rank nationally at Smart India Hackathon 2025 among 10,000+ participating teams.

items.title: Prepzo
items.description: A full-stack SaaS interview preparation platform built with Next.js, React, and PostgreSQL featuring secure Google OAuth authentication and server-side REST APIs. Implements Row-Level Security for multi-user data isolation across PostgreSQL tables, analytics dashboards, personalized study plans, PDF export functionality, and real-time streaming features.
Secured 1st rank nationally at Smart India Hackathon 2025 (AICTE) among 10,000+ participating teams by building 'Navjivan', an AI-powered wellness platform serving 200+ beta users.
Reached Semi-Finalist stage at RIFT 26 National Hackathon.
Reached a LeetCode rating of 1700+ by solving 200+ Data Structures and Algorithms problems.
